pi_items.source: setup_task.sh script injects the patient data synthetically, defining firstName as 'Ahmed Hassan' and lastName as 'Ali'.
setup_task.sh explicitly uses PATIENT_ID='patient_p1_000002' to query and seed the CouchDB database.
Task description instructs the creation of an operative plan with Operation Description 'Laparoscopic Cholecystectomy', and verifier.py checks for 'cholecystectomy'.
Task description instructs the agent to set the surgeon to 'Dr. Sarah Mitchell', and verifier.py checks for 'mitchell'.
Task description instructs setting Case Complexity to 'Intermediate', which verifier.py strictly expects.
Task description requires Status to be 'Planned', and verifier.py explicitly evaluates this.

privileged_info_summary: The patient data for Ahmed Hassan Ali (patient_p1_000002) is synthetically generated and dynamically injected via setup_task.sh. The required operation parameters (Laparoscopic Cholecystectomy, Dr. Sarah Mitchell, Intermediate complexity, and Planned status) exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description and are explicitly evaluated in the verifier.py script.
